# Tracker - Bug Tracking SaaS

> A modern bug tracking and project management platform with team collaboration, real-time activity feeds, and subscription-based billing.

## Pages

- [Home](/)
- [Pricing](/pricing)
- [Sign Up](/auth/signup)
- [Login](/auth/login)

## Features

- Bug tracking and issue management
- Team collaboration with role-based access
- Real-time activity monitoring
- Project organization with kanban boards
- Subscription billing and plan management
